name: Oil
description:
You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below.
{"name": "Dousing a Creature or an Object", "type": "entries", "entries": ["When you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing an Oil flask. Target one creature or object within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw ({@dc 8} plus your Dexterity modifier and {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}) or be covered in oi
